title: Agent Health — Layer 7
description: Real-time health of every agent: success rate, latency, estimated cost, failure reasons.
notes: All cost values are estimated, not verified. No PII; customer_handle and tenant_id only.

panels.title: Agent success rate
panels.query: share of agent_observability traces with guardrail_result='ok' grouped by agent_name over 1h

panels.title: Agent P95 latency
panels.query: p95(latency_ms) from agent_observability /recent grouped by agent_name over 1h

panels.title: Top agent failure reasons
panels.query: count of traces grouped by error_type where success=false over 24h

panels.title: Token usage per agent
panels.query: sum(prompt_tokens + completion_tokens) from llm_calls grouped by agent_name over 24h

panels.title: Agent run throughput
panels.query: count of agent_observability traces grouped by agent_name over 1h
